allow: Bash(py -W ignore -c "import app; print\(''life_potential filter registered:'', ''life_potential'' in app.app.jinja_env.filters\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK — no syntax errors'\)")

Bash(python -c "from jinja2 import Environment; env = Environment\(\); [print\(f+': OK'\) or None for f in ['templates/analysis.html','templates/share.html'] if env.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) or True]")
Bash(python -c "from jinja2 import Environment; env = Environment\(\); print\(env.parse\(open\('templates/analysis.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) and 'OK'\)")

Bash(py -c "from jinja2 import Environment; env=Environment\(\); env.parse\(open\('templates/analysis.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('analysis.html: OK'\); env.parse\(open\('templates/share.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('share.html: OK'\)")
Bash(py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('app.py: OK'\)")
